Off Calendar Dec-17-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Oct-29-2024 Continued To Dec-17-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Jodi Phillips, Esq., specially appearing for Jon Vaught, Administrator in propria persona.

Counsel reports as to the cause of the delay in filing anything since the previous calling of the subject matter. Counsel reports that Mr. Vaught now has all the information he needs to close the subject estate and requests a continuance to prepare and file a petition.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Dec-17-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Lydia Villarreal. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Wong. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-27-2024 Continued To Oct-29-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jon Vaught appeared by zoom in propria persona.

Mr. Vaught stated that this slipped under the radar, that it is a complicated case that involves civil litigation, that the litigation matter recently settled and that he is now prepared to close the estate. Status on close of estate is continued to October 29, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court informed Mr. Vaught that an inventory and appraisal is needed.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-11-2023 Granted Per Written Order
